## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:api` when API/auth/tenant/document/operations behavior changes
- [ ] `npm run db:migrate:verify` when Prisma migrations change

## Release Risk

- [ ] Auth/session behavior changed
- [ ] Tenant isolation or RBAC changed
- [ ] Billing or document access changed
- [ ] Prisma schema or migrations changed
- [ ] AI/GitHub/export behavior changed
- [ ] Environment variables or deployment config changed
